create_time.description: The time when the location tracker was created.

description.description: A brief explanation or details about the location tracker.

id.description: The unique identifier of the location tracker.

kms_key_id.description: The ID of the AWS KMS key used for encrypting the location data.

position_filtering.description: The type of position filtering used by the tracker, affecting how positions are processed.

tags.description: A set of tags associated with the location tracker for organization and management.

tracker_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the location tracker.

update_time.description: The time when the location tracker was last updated.
